prompt: Create a vertical cyberpunk fashion book-cover/poster for William Gibson, inspired by a dark neon neuromancer aesthetic. Use a low-angle full-body hero shot of a single young male cyberpunk operative standing wide-legged on a glossy reflective floor, towering over the camera, wearing an oversized black-purple leather trench coat with translucent purple lining, cropped tactical top, black strapped cargo pants, many buckles and zippers, chunky combat boots, fingerless gloves, and long metallic claw-like cybernetic fingers on one outstretched hand. Keep the face intentionally obscured by a soft square blur, with short spiky black hair visible. The entire palette is black, ultraviolet, electric violet, and smoky blue, with dramatic rim lighting, volumetric fog at the floor, rain-slick reflections, high contrast, cinematic photoreal detail, and glossy editorial styling. Behind him, place huge translucent glowing block letters spelling MOLLY across the wall, partially behind the character, as if made of frosted purple neon glass. At the bottom, add a large spaced-out title NEUROMANCER in thin futuristic uppercase letters with a purple glow. Add exactly 8 small typography elements around the poster: 1 Korean quote at top left reading 사이버펑크는 죽지 않는다 그것은 진화한다; 2 a small location stack reading “SEOUL / LONDON / NEW YORK”; 3 a small globe icon; 4 a tiny label reading “COLLECTION: NEUROMANCER _001”; 5 a plus-sign crosshair symbol; 6 small stacked text reading “SYSTEM OVERRIDE / REALITY IS OPTIONAL”; 7 right-side text reading “FUTURE IS UNWRITTEN”; 8 a vertical microtext strip reading “NEO SEOUL PROTOCOL 2084”. Add exactly 5 footer details: “NMCR_001”, “SPRING / SUMMER 2084”, “DATA THIEF / SOLO OPERATIVE”, a small globe icon, and a barcode labeled “NMCR 001”. Composition should feel like a premium sci-fi novel cover mixed with a luxury streetwear campaign, ultra-detailed, sharp, moody, no extra characters, no extra main text beyond the specified typography.
